name: waveform_image
description: Generate waveform PNG images from a video or audio file, subdivided into ≤N-second chunks for visual silence analysis

input.description: Source video or audio file (use 'inputs' for batch parallel processing)

output.description: JSON array of {path, start, end} — one entry per chunk. Batch mode returns an array of arrays.

params.name: chunk-duration
params.description: Max duration per waveform image in seconds (default: 10)

params.name: out-dir
params.description: Output directory for PNG files (default: <stem>_waveforms/ alongside the input file)
